name: cyber-soc-dashboard
description: A SOC-style threat detection dashboard combining: - **Network anomaly detection**: RandomForest + Autoencoder trained on NSL-KDD - **Phishing email detection**: TF-IDF + Logistic Regression trained on the Enron-Spam dataset - **Threat intel matching**: Trie-based IP/domain blocklist lookups (O(k) lookup time) - **Attack pattern clustering**: Graph-based port scan / DDoS detection - **Real-time alerts**: WebSocket broadcast to connected dashboard clients
